<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Shubham Kulkarni — Software Engineer</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg-1:#0a1216;
    --bg-2:#0F2027;
    --bg-3:#203A43;
    --bg-4:#2C5364;
    --accent:#36BCF7;
    --accent-dim:#1b6f96;
    --text:#F5F8FA;
    --muted:#A8C4D6;
    --dim:#6f8fa3;
    --card:#132029cc;
    --border:#2c4a58;
    --radius:16px;
    --maxw:1120px;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    html{scroll-behavior:auto;}
    *{animation-duration:0.001ms !important; transition-duration:0.001ms !important;}
  }
  body{
    background:var(--bg-2);
    color:var(--text);
    font-family:'Inter', sans-serif;
    line-height:1.6;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  h1,h2,h3,.display{font-family:'Poppins', sans-serif;}
  .mono{font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;}
  a{color:inherit; text-decoration:none;}
  img{max-width:100%; display:block;}

  ::selection{background:var(--accent); color:#0a1216;}

  /* ---------- scrollbar ---------- */
  ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:10px;}
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg-2);}
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--bg-4); border-radius:10px;}

  /* ---------- layout helpers ---------- */
  .wrap{max-width:var(--maxw); margin:0 auto; padding:0 32px;}
  section{padding:110px 0;}
  @media (max-width:720px){
    section{padding:72px 0;}
    .wrap{padding:0 22px;}
  }

  .eyebrow{
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size:13px; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:18px;
  }
  .eyebrow::before{
    content:''; width:26px; height:1px; background:var(--accent);
  }

  .section-title{
    font-size:clamp(28px, 4vw, 40px);
    font-weight:700;
    margin-bottom:14px;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  }
  .section-sub{
    color:var(--muted);
    max-width:560px;
    margin-bottom:56px;
    font-size:16px;
  }

  /* ---------- reveal on scroll ---------- */
  .reveal{opacity:0; transform:translateY(24px); transition:opacity .7s ease, transform .7s ease;}
  .reveal.in{opacity:1; transform:none;}

  /* ================= HERO ================= */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    min-height:100svh;
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-end;
    overflow:hidden;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(6,12,16,0.35) 0%, rgba(8,16,20,0.55) 45%, var(--bg-2) 96%),
      linear-gradient(100deg, rgba(6,14,18,0.92) 0%, rgba(6,14,18,0.55) 42%, rgba(6,14,18,0.15) 68%),
      url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
    background-size:cover;
    background-position:center 22%;
    background-attachment:fixed;
    background-repeat:no-repeat;
  }
  @media (max-width:720px){
    .hero{background-attachment:scroll; align-items:flex-end;}
  }
  .hero-inner{
    position:relative;
    z-index:2;
    width:100%;
    padding:0 32px 88px;
    max-width:var(--maxw);
    margin:0 auto;
  }
  .hero-kicker{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    color:var(--accent);
    font-size:14px;
    letter-spacing:0.16em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:22px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
  }
  .hero-kicker .dot{
    width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--accent);
    box-shadow:0 0 12px 2px var(--accent);
    animation:pulse 2.2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulse{
    0%,100%{opacity:1;} 50%{opacity:0.35;}
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(44px, 8vw, 92px);
    font-weight:800;
    line-height:0.98;
    letter-spacing:-0.02em;
  }
  .hero h1 .accent{color:var(--accent);}
  .hero-title{
    margin-top:26px;
    font-size:clamp(16px, 2.2vw, 21px);
    color:var(--muted);
    max-width:640px;
    font-weight:400;
  }
  .hero-tags{
    margin-top:26px;
    display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px;
  }
  .tag{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size:12.5px;
    color:var(--dim);
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    background:rgba(10,18,22,0.5);
    padding:6px 12px;
    border-radius:999px;
    backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
  }
  .scroll-cue{
    position:absolute; left:32px; bottom:28px; z-index:2;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    color:var(--dim); font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size:12px;
    letter-spacing:0.1em;
  }
  .scroll-cue .line{
    width:1px; height:34px; background:linear-gradient(var(--accent), transparent);
    animation:drop 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes drop{
    0%{transform:scaleY(0); transform-origin:top;}
    50%{transform:scaleY(1); transform-origin:top;}
    50.01%{transform-origin:bottom;}
    100%{transform:scaleY(0); transform-origin:bottom;}
  }
  @media (max-width:720px){ .scroll-cue{display:none;} }

  /* ================= ABOUT ================= */
  .about-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.1fr 0.9fr;
    gap:64px;
    align-items:start;
  }
  @media (max-width:820px){ .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .about-text p{
    color:var(--muted);
    font-size:17px;
    margin-bottom:18px;
    max-width:56ch;
  }
  .about-text strong{color:var(--text); font-weight:600;}
  .facts{
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0;
    border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .fact{
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:20px;
    padding:18px 0;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    font-size:14.5px;
  }
  .fact span:first-child{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    color:var(--dim);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:0.06em;
    font-size:12.5px;
  }
  .fact span:last-child{color:var(--text); text-align:right;}

  /* ================= STACK ================= */
  .stack-cat{margin-bottom:44px;}
  .stack-cat h3{
    font-size:13px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.12em;
    color:var(--dim); margin-bottom:20px; font-weight:500;
  }
  .icon-row{display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:14px;}
  .icon-chip{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px;
    background:var(--card);
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:14px;
    padding:12px 18px 12px 12px;
    transition:transform .25s ease, border-color .25s ease, background .25s ease;
  }
  .icon-chip:hover{
    transform:translateY(-3px);
    border-color:var(--accent);
    background:#16262fcc;
  }
  .icon-chip img{width:34px; height:34px;}
  .icon-chip span{font-size:14px; color:var(--muted); font-weight:500;}

  /* ================= PROJECTS ================= */
  .project-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap:24px;
  }
  @media (max-width:720px){ .project-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .project-card{
    background:var(--card);
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:32px;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    transition:border-color .25s ease, transform .25s ease;
  }
  .project-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent); transform:translateY(-4px);}
  .project-card .num{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    color:var(--accent-dim);
    font-size:13px;
    margin-bottom:16px;
    display:block;
  }
  .project-card h3{font-size:20px; margin-bottom:12px; font-weight:600;}
  .project-card ul{margin:0 0 18px 18px; color:var(--muted); font-size:14.5px;}
  .project-card li{margin-bottom:6px;}
  .stack-line{
    display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px;
  }
  .stack-line span{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size:11.5px;
    color:var(--accent);
    background:rgba(54,188,247,0.09);
    border:1px solid rgba(54,188,247,0.25);
    padding:4px 10px;
    border-radius:999px;
  }

  /* ================= GITHUB ================= */
  .gh-stats{display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:20px; margin-bottom:20px;}
  .gh-stats img{border-radius:var(--radius); flex:1; min-width:280px; border:1px solid var(--border);}
  .gh-wide img{border-radius:var(--radius); width:100%; border:1px solid var(--border);}

  /* ================= CONNECT ================= */
  .connect{
    text-align:center;
  }
  .connect .section-sub{margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;}
  .connect-links{
    display:flex; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:16px;
    margin-top:8px;
  }
  .connect-links a{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    padding:14px 26px;
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:12px;
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:14.5px;
    background:var(--card);
    transition:all .25s ease;
  }
  .connect-links a:hover{border-color:var(--accent); color:var(--accent); transform:translateY(-3px);}

  footer{
    padding:44px 0 60px;
    text-align:center;
    color:var(--dim);
    font-size:13px;
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  }
  footer .quote{
    color:var(--muted); font-family:'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size:15px;
    margin-bottom:18px; font-style:italic;
  }

  .divider{height:1px; background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--border), transparent);}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ================= HERO ================= -->
<header class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-kicker"><span class="dot"></span> available for opportunities</div>
    <h1>SHUBHAM<br><span class="accent">KULKARNI</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-title">Software Engineering Master's student at EPITA, France — building secure, scalable backend systems and AI-powered developer tools.</p>
    <div class="hero-tags">
      <span class="tag">Java / Spring Boot</span>
      <span class="tag">Kotlin / Android</span>
      <span class="tag">Cryptography</span>
      <span class="tag">AI Agents</span>
      <span class="tag">AWS · Linux</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-cue"><span class="line"></span> SCROLL</div>
</header>

<!-- ================= ABOUT ================= -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="wrap about-grid">
    <div class="about-text reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">About</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Backend-first, curious by default</h2>
      <p>I'm a <strong>Software Engineering Master's student at EPITA, France</strong>, focused on <strong>backend and full-stack development</strong> — Java/Spring Boot on the server side, Kotlin on Android.</p>
      <p>Outside coursework I go deep on <strong>cryptography and developer tooling</strong>, and I've been exploring <strong>blockchain and DeFi</strong> — Bitcoin's mechanics, Ethereum, smart contracts — alongside building AI agents.</p>
      <p>Comfortable across <strong>AWS, Linux, and DevOps</strong> workflows, from EC2 deployments to CI pipelines.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="facts reveal">
      <div class="fact"><span>Based</span><span>France</span></div>
      <div class="fact"><span>Study</span><span>MSc Software Engineering, EPITA</span></div>
      <div class="fact"><span>Focus</span><span>Backend · Full-Stack</span></div>
      <div class="fact"><span>Languages</span><span>Java, Kotlin, Python, C/C++</span></div>
      <div class="fact"><span>Currently</span><span>Microservices, Docker, K8s, System Design</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider wrap" style="max-width:var(--maxw); margin:0 auto;"></div>

<!-- ================= TECH STACK ================= -->
<section id="stack">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">Tech Stack</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Tools I reach for</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">Grouped by where they show up in the stack — from language to deployment.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="stack-cat reveal">
      <h3>Languages</h3>
      <div class="icon-row">
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=java" alt="Java"><span>Java</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=python" alt="Python"><span>Python</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=kotlin" alt="Kotlin"><span>Kotlin</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=c" alt="C"><span>C</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=cpp" alt="C++"><span>C++</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=bash" alt="Bash"><span>Bash</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="stack-cat reveal">
      <h3>Backend &amp; Frameworks</h3>
      <div class="icon-row">
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=spring" alt="Spring Boot"><span>Spring Boot</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=maven" alt="Maven"><span>Maven</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=gradle" alt="Gradle"><span>Gradle</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=androidstudio" alt="Android"><span>Android</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="stack-cat reveal">
      <h3>Databases</h3>
      <div class="icon-row">
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=mysql" alt="MySQL"><span>MySQL</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=sqlite" alt="SQLite"><span>SQLite</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=postgresql" alt="PostgreSQL"><span>PostgreSQL</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="stack-cat reveal">
      <h3>Cloud, DevOps &amp; Tools</h3>
      <div class="icon-row">
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=aws" alt="AWS"><span>AWS</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=docker" alt="Docker"><span>Docker</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=kubernetes" alt="Kubernetes"><span>Kubernetes</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=linux" alt="Linux"><span>Linux</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=git" alt="Git"><span>Git</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=github" alt="GitHub"><span>GitHub</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="stack-cat reveal">
      <h3>IDEs &amp; Dev Tools</h3>
      <div class="icon-row">
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=idea" alt="IntelliJ IDEA"><span>IntelliJ IDEA</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=vscode" alt="VS Code"><span>VS Code</span></div>
        <div class="icon-chip"><img src="https://skillicons.dev/icons?i=postman" alt="Postman"><span>Postman</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider wrap" style="max-width:var(--maxw); margin:0 auto;"></div>

<!-- ================= PROJECTS ================= -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">Featured Work</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Projects</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">A few things I've built recently, solo and in group work at EPITA.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="project-grid">

      <div class="project-card reveal">
        <span class="num">01</span>
        <h3>🔐 Cryptography Visualizer</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Interactive Tkinter desktop app, built with a group</li>
          <li>SHA-256, ECDSA (NIST P-256), Merkle proofs</li>
          <li>Nine-tab GUI with SQLite persistence</li>
          <li>Grew out of research into zk-SNARKs (Tornado Cash case study)</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="stack-line"><span>Python</span><span>Tkinter</span><span>SQLite</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card reveal">
        <span class="num">02</span>
        <h3>🤖 Helpdesk Ticket Triage Agent</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>AI-powered triage agent, EPITA group assignment</li>
          <li>n8n workflow automation integrated with GLPI</li>
          <li>Groq-hosted LLM applying ITIL classification logic</li>
          <li>Formal documentation with architecture diagrams</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="stack-line"><span>n8n</span><span>GLPI</span><span>Groq LLM</span><span>ITIL</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card reveal">
        <span class="num">03</span>
        <h3>⏰ MyClock — Android App</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Multi-feature app, pure Android SDK (no Jetpack)</li>
          <li>Digital clock, alarm, timer, stopwatch</li>
          <li>Clean Kotlin architecture, explained end-to-end</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="stack-line"><span>Kotlin</span><span>Android SDK</span><span>XML</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="project-card reveal">
        <span class="num">04</span>
        <h3>☁️ AWS &amp; Linux Projects</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>AWS EC2 deployment, Apache web server</li>
          <li>HTTPS with self-signed SSL certificates</li>
          <li>Linux administration and shell scripting</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="stack-line"><span>AWS</span><span>Linux</span><span>Apache</span><span>Bash</span></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider wrap" style="max-width:var(--maxw); margin:0 auto;"></div>

<!-- ================= GITHUB ================= -->
<section id="github">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow">GitHub</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Activity</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">Live stats, pulled straight from GitHub.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="gh-stats reveal">
      <img src="https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api?username=kulkarni6060&show_icons=true&theme=tokyonight&hide_border=true&count_private=true" alt="GitHub Stats">
      <img src="https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api/top-langs/?username=kulkarni6060&layout=compact&theme=tokyonight&hide_border=true&langs_count=8" alt="Top Languages">
    </div>
    <div class="gh-wide reveal" style="margin-bottom:20px;">
      <img src="https://streak-stats.demolab.com?user=kulkarni6060&theme=tokyonight&hide_border=true" alt="Streak">
    </div>
    <div class="gh-wide reveal">
      <img src="https://github-profile-trophy.vercel.app/?username=kulkarni6060&theme=tokyonight&no-frame=true&no-bg=true&margin-w=10&row=1&column=6" alt="Trophies">
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="divider wrap" style="max-width:var(--maxw); margin:0 auto;"></div>

<!-- ================= CONNECT ================= -->
<section id="connect" class="connect">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="eyebrow" style="justify-content:center;">Connect</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Let's talk</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">Open to backend, full-stack, and internship opportunities.</p>
      <div class="connect-links">
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/shubham-kulkarni-22bb731aa/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/kulkarni6060" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
        <a href="mailto:YOUR-EMAIL@gmail.com">Email</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="quote">"Building secure, scalable and efficient software — one line of code at a time."</div>
  <div>© 2026 Shubham Kulkarni</div>
</footer>

<script>
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('in'); io.unobserve(e.target); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.15 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => io.observe(el));
</script>

</body>
</html>
